Author: Akari
Name: Market Helper
Punchline: Auto-undercut retainers, list items, and compare market prices across regions.
Description:
Market Helper is an all-in-one market board tool with three tabs:

UNDERCUT — Stand near a summoning bell and press Run. It walks every retainer on the bell and undercuts each listed item to the lowest price. HQ/NQ handling, own-retainer protection, per-item overrides, and price memory within a run. Skips mannequin/display items (detected by the game's mannequin icon) so they're never touched or delisted.

LISTER — Build a list of items (hold CTRL and hover to quick-add, or search). Press Go and it walks the bell and lists them all, pricing each at the most common market price (ignoring lone troll/outlier listings) minus your undercut. Prices against your world, data center, or whole region. Handles the 20-item-per-retainer cap by rolling extra items to the next retainer. Includes a no-touch dry-run preview.

FLIPPER — Search any marketable item and compare prices across Japan, America, Europe and Materia via Universalis. Top 10 listings per region, best cross-region flip, and seller/buyer tax modeling.

Open with /markethelp, /market, /mh, or /undercut.
